payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Partial rectangular pillow showing horizontal beige, light-blue and white stripes on a woven fabric, with a visible seam and slightly flattened soft profile; right edge of the pillow is cropped by the image and it appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).
